creator: lehmannwer@gmail.com
text: Thank you, but in the meantime I managed to run fsck and later copying back the original file using the FreeBSD 12 installation CD in live mode. I feel totally discouraged to mess like that with my system again now as I am an end-user. I think I don't want to engage in any further testing of that file for now. I hope you can go on without me and get the problem solved, as I am very much interested in using Firefox/Seamonkey/Thunderbird.
